titleStmt.title: SII 7.252: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 252. (A.R. No. 75 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE BINNANA-BASTI WITHIN THE SAME BASTI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ .
jīyāttrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti
śrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1526 naya
saluva śōbhakṛtu saṁvatsarada mīnamāsa yeraḍaneya Ādivāra
dallū geyda kāryya . śrīcārukīrttipaṁḍitadēvarugaḷa priyāgraśi
ṣyaraha śrī vīratiṁmarājavoḍeyarāda Ajilaru yēnūra
beṭṭadalli guṁmaṭasvāmiya nelegoḷisi Ā balada bhāgada śāṁ
tīśvarana caityālayada dharmmavanu taṁmma rāṇivāsiyarādaha
pārśvadēviyaraha biṁnāṇiyarige koṭṭa saṁbaṁdha Avaru Ā basti
yanu kaṭṭisi Ā svāmiya Amrutapaḍige biṭṭa kṣētrada vivara
veṁteṁdoḍe . yiṁnorāḷavaṭṭadakuki poḷiya paḍuvaṇa
beyalallu timarukajilagadde saha gadde 14 kkaṁ bittuva bījavari
mūḍe 48 beṭṭu gadde 5 kkaṁ bī mū 46 vubhayaṁ gadde 19 kkeṁ mu 94
kkaṁ gēṇi Akki baḷḷa 50 lekkada mūḍe 60 peṁjaḷaḍa māgaṇeyallu
muḍirāje bailalu nālku mūḍe mūru mūḍegaḷeṁba gadde
timaru saha gadde 7 kkaṁ bittuva bīja mū 20 beṭṭu gadde 8 kkaṁ bī mū 7
vubhayaṁ gadde 15 kaṁ bittuva bīja mū 27 kkaṁ gēṇi Akki ba 50
gēṇi mū 12 vubhayaṁ māgaṇe lli gēṇi Akki ba 20 ra lekka mūḍe
taṁma vūroḷage harigaḍiyeṁballi saṁkunaneyena bāḷina si
ddhāyadiṁda varaha ga 49 ho sa ṭiya Appājibhaṭṭana bāḷi
va ḷa goṁmaṭanāthana saṁnidhiyalli pāṁḍyapparasarāda biṁ
nāṇiyara hesaralli naḍeva nityahāladhārege māgūranūru pā
rśvada siddhāyadiṁda ga 190This may be read alsor0. . yī dharmmasvavanu Aḷipidavaru gaṁ
geya taḍiyalli gēḷu kavileya koṁda pāpakke hōguvaru .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēcca vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . varddhatāṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 7.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
